info.name: 1AI Affiliate Platform
info.description:
Complete API collection for the 1AI Affiliate tracking platform.

## Authentication
All endpoints (except Auth > Login, Auth > Register, and Postback) require a JWT token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}
```

## Environment Variables
- `base_url` — API server URL (e.g. http://localhost:3001)
- `admin_token` — JWT for admin user
- `affiliate_token` — JWT for affiliate user
- `advertiser_token` — JWT for advertiser user

item.name: Postback (Public)
item.description: No auth required — secured via click_id uniqueness and optional signature
